See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 269760 => 'Domoni', 269761 => 'Mutsamudu', 269762 => 'Mohéli', 269763 => 'Moroni', 269767 => 'Mbéni', 269768 => 'Mitsamiouli', 269769 => 'Foumbouni', 269770 => 'Domoni', 269771 => 'Mutsamudu', 269772 => 'Mohéli', 269773 => 'Moroni', 269774 => 'Moroni', 269775 => 'Moroni', 269777 => 'Mbéni', 269778 => 'Mitsamiouli', 269779 => 'Foumbouni', ];
